title: Infantry soars into provincial league
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Oudtshoorn Military Base soccer team, Infantry School, showed no mercy in gaining promotion to the elite Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League on Saturday 31 August.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Oudtshoorn Military Base soccer team, Infantry School, showed no mercy in gaining promotion to the elite Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League on Saturday 31 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In the Safa Eden Regional League mini-playoffs final at the military base sports facility in Oudtshoorn, they beat Peace Makers FC 3-0. The first half featured balanced play between the two sides."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Infantry School scored one goal, capitalising on poor defence from Peace Makers during a corner kick. After Infantry School's second goal, which came in the second half from a powerful strike on the left side of the field, Peace Makers upped their game.","html":"Infantry School scored one goal, capitalising on poor defence from Peace Makers during a corner kick. After Infantry School's second goal, which came in the second half from a powerful strike on the left side of the field, Peace Makers upped their game."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They put more pressure on the Infantry School defenders, but couldn't prevent them from scoring their third goal.","html":"They put more pressure on the Infantry School defenders, but couldn't prevent them from scoring their third goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The home side was enjoying the game remaining on the attack, and Peace Makers had to defend with all their might to prevent a fourth goal against them.","html":"The home side was enjoying the game remaining on the attack, and Peace Makers had to defend with all their might to prevent a fourth goal against them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Infantry School will be joining teams such as Oriented Birds (Plett), Cape Town Spurs, Ubuntu Football and FN Rangers in the provincial league.","html":"Infantry School will be joining teams such as Oriented Birds (Plett), Cape Town Spurs, Ubuntu Football and FN Rangers in the provincial league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Infantry School gained promotion to the Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League. Photo: Zama Gagu","html":"Infantry School gained promotion to the Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League. Photo: Zama Gagu"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
